description:
Make the Playwright suite operational in CI and define the staging smoke gate required before production launch.

**Scope**
- Add CI workflow steps or documented pipeline commands for Playwright browser install/cache, app build/start, E2E execution, and artifact upload.
- Split commands into fast PR smoke, full local/CI E2E, and staging smoke profiles.
- Define staging smoke coverage: marketing route, auth route, intake start, protected dashboard redirect, webhook health endpoint or equivalent health route, and any vendor-safe billing/MDI status smoke available at that stage.
- Document triage expectations for traces/screenshots/videos, flaky-test handling, and release-blocking criteria.

**Acceptance**
- CI publishes Playwright reports and traces for failed runs.
- PR smoke and full E2E commands are documented and runnable by developers.
- Staging smoke can run against the deployed staging URL with only approved non-PHI synthetic accounts and secret-store configuration.
- Production deployment is blocked until the staging smoke gate is passing or a documented launch exception is approved.
title: CI integration, staging smoke suite, and launch E2E gate
